description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust and angular slide with prominent serrations and venting cuts along the top. The frame is contoured for ergonomic handling, with a textured grip that appears to provide a secure hold. The trigger guard is thick and rounded, offering ample space for finger placement and possibly gloved use. The barrel is slightly extended and ported, suggesting enhanced recoil management and accuracy. Minimal external markings are visible, giving the firearm a sleek, tactical appearance. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile.
description: A matte black, semi-automatic handgun with a vented slide, textured ergonomic grip, and a flat magazine base. The design is modern and tactical, with minimal external markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the slide with venting cuts, the ergonomic grip, and the flat magazine base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, vented slide top, and the width of the grip and trigger guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide serrations, safety lever, and the overall streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, rear sight, and the grip's width and contour.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a pronounced ergonomic curve, featuring a textured surface that appears stippled or checkered for enhanced traction. It is constructed from a matte black polymer, providing a modern, non-slip feel. The grip is slightly flared at the base for better control and may include subtle finger grooves for improved ergonomics. No visible logos or embellishments are present, emphasizing a utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a thick profile that offers ample space for finger placement. It is smoothly integrated into the frame, lacking any aggressive undercuts or squared-off edges. The surface appears smooth, with no visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a clean and functional look.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of medium length and features prominent porting or venting cuts along the top, likely for recoil reduction. The profile is straight and unthreaded, with a matte black finish matching the rest of the firearm. No external markings or threading for accessories are visible.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, contributing to the handgun's minimalist and tactical appearance.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests. Its design is simple and streamlined, lacking any visible logos, texturing, or embellishments.
